---
title: "Assignment 1"
author: "Hiba Bashir"
output: html_document
---

# 1. Load Dataset

```{r}
df <- iris
head(df)
summary(df$Sepal.Length)
summary(df$Sepal.Width)
summary(df$Petal.Length)
summary(df$Petal.Width)
table(df$Species)
df$Size <- ifelse(df$Petal.Length > 3, "Large", "Small")
table(df$Size)
hist(df$Petal.Length,
     col="lightblue",
     main="Petal Length Distribution",
     xlab="Petal Length")
plot(df$Sepal.Length,
     df$Petal.Length,
     col="blue",
     pch=19,
     main="Sepal Length vs Petal Length",
     xlab="Sepal Length",
   

summary(df)
